creator: martinp@tildeslash.com
text:
diff -ruN monit/Makefile monit-new/Makefile
--- monit/Makefile	2010-03-17 03:46:53.000000000 +0100
+++ monit-new/Makefile	2010-09-23 18:49:06.000000000 +0200
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	monit
-PORTVERSION=	5.1.1
+PORTVERSION=	5.2
 PORTREVISION=	1
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.mmonit.com/monit/dist/
diff -ruN monit/distinfo monit-new/distinfo
--- monit/distinfo	2010-02-23 16:49:25.000000000 +0100
+++ monit-new/distinfo	2010-09-23 18:49:12.000000000 +0200
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (monit-5.1.1.tar.gz) = 4bbd3845ae1cbab13ec211824e0486dc
-SHA256 (monit-5.1.1.tar.gz) = bf789e0660410e8c63f4b3dc2eeab9889347e6494a6dc1c0e764343cae0dc1ba
-SIZE (monit-5.1.1.tar.gz) = 615924
+MD5 (monit-5.2.tar.gz) = a58a6925d589ea1683c347df6dfb5388
+SHA256 (monit-5.2.tar.gz) = ad84f5c7faa215c47d5bcbf21f9248a2fd7c0e2163c76c25ff9b56e83284b3f5
+SIZE (monit-5.2.tar.gz) = 608327
